name: Tpay
description: Polish payment gateway with BLIK, bank transfers, cards, BNPL, and plugins for WooCommerce, Shopify, Magento.

seo.title: Tpay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Tpay: Polish payment gateway with BLIK, bank transfers, cards, BNPL, and plugins for WooCommerce, Shopify, Magento.

when_to_use: BLIK one-click payment integration for Polish e-commerce
WooCommerce and Shopify plugin for Polish payment acceptance
Bank transfer and BNPL checkout for Polish online merchants

pros: Native BLIK support — key for Polish market
BNPL and cards alongside bank transfers
review.verdict: Reliable Polish gateway with BLIK done right — not a pan-EU choice, but the default if PL is your core market.
review.best_for: E-commerce merchants targeting Polish buyers needing BLIK and local methods
review.not_for: Multi-country EU merchants needing unified modern API
